general_info.definition: graphene quantum dots-sensitized TiO2 nanotube arrays

method.type: Electrophoretic deposition with silane linker-assisted coupling

optical.measurement_conditions: UV-vis diffuse reflectance spectroscopy used; PEC response measured under visible light (λ > 400 nm, 350 W xenon lamp)

structural.crystallinity: XRD peak at 14.8° corresponding to (002) reflection of graphene oxide

applications.performance: GQDs/TiO2 NTs nanohybrids exhibited significantly enhanced visible-light PEC activity
applications.comparative_advantage: high sensitivity, good selectivity, acceptable reproducibility and stability

feedback.label: Bad
feedback.expert_comment: Omission Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> general_info -> alternative_names' contained '['GQDs/TiO2 NTs']' in the source text, but it was extracted as null/missing. | Contextual Error: The correct text for carbon_dots -> synthesis -> method -> type was 'Commercial source', but the model wrongly extracted 'Electrophoretic deposition with silane linker-assisted coupling'. | Additional Structual Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> properties -> optical -> measurement_conditions' is not present in the source json and do not agregate relevant information to the characterization of the optical properties of the carbon dots.
